name: Crouse Park
description: Crouse Park is a place to play pickleball in Sparta, NC. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Roaring Gap Club
description: Roaring Gap Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Roaring Gap, NC. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
